meme_1.label: Meme 1
meme_1.overlay_text: Me after 30 days of journaling like I didn't use to spiral about everything
meme_1.ig_caption: A different person walked out of those 30 days ✨
meme_1.fb_caption: POV: You started journaling 30 days ago and now your whole energy has upgraded. Better sleep, clearer thoughts, actual boundaries. 😌 Who else started journaling and never looked back? Tag a friend who needs to hear this!

meme_2.label: Meme 2
meme_2.overlay_text: Me when he said he's not looking for anything serious after 3 months
meme_2.ig_caption: Babe I wrote about this in my journal and I'm not even mad anymore 💅
meme_2.fb_caption: Okay why does this face say EVERYTHING about modern dating? 😅 If your journaling entries sound like 'I am fine, I will not text first, I am thriving' — you're our people. Tag someone who gets it. 👇

repost_1.label: Repost 1
repost_1.creator: journalingoutloud
repost_1.ig_caption: Take care of your mind, one page at a time 🎞️ This reel is such a gentle reminder that your inner world deserves attention too. ✨

repost_2.label: Repost 2
repost_2.creator: thejournallab
repost_2.ig_caption: "Self-care is the time you give back to yourself" 💜 @thejournallab gets it — journaling isn't a chore, it's a gift to future you.

quote_1.label: Quote 1
quote_1.quote: The only journey is the one within.
quote_1.fb_caption: Sometimes the most profound adventure is the one happening quietly inside you. ✨ Save this one for a moment when you need a reminder to look inward. Who would you share this with?

quote_2.label: Quote 2
quote_2.quote: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
quote_2.fb_caption: This one never gets old. 💜 Learning to be your own biggest fan is the greatest project you'll ever take on. Save this for the days you forget. Who in your life needs to read this today?
